title: The Final Walkthrough Guide: Reclaiming Your Rent Deposit and Safely Handing Over the Old Keys
excerpt: Final walkthrough guide: reclaim rent deposit safely hand over old keys, move-out tenant landlord checklist documented Addis Ababa.
content:
The final walkthrough guide: reclaiming your rent deposit and safely handing over the old keys

Final walkthrough is deposit reclamation courtroom—empty unit, keys counted, meters photographed, and signed form same hour or landlord narrative grows against you. This guide merges walkthrough discipline with safe key handover so birr return follows paper not argument.

This final walkthrough guide reclaims rent deposit and hands over old keys safely.

Walkthrough preparation

  • Compare move-in photo baseline room by room.
  • Professional clean receipt attached.
  • All damage disclosed repaired or negotiated itemized.
  • Fixtures working bulbs faucets.
  • Closets drawers empty open demonstration.

During joint walkthrough

Landlord or agent present; video continuous pan; note disagreements form not verbal; no keys until form signed or witness; meter photos both parties frame.

Key handover protocol

Count keys remotes fobs cards; list serial written; duplicate retained zero unauthorized; mailbox key; parking pass; gate clicker; photo envelope handed.

Deposit follow-up

Written demand timeline lease clause; polite escalation; itemized deduction dispute with move-in photos; legal aid bad faith withhold.

Active Movers coordination

Load before final clean or zone clean; wall gouge prevention runners; last truck sweep closet confirm empty.

Conclusion

Final walkthrough plus key list signed equals deposit leverage—reclaim rent return when empty unit documented and keys handed witness not slid under door hope.
author: Active Movers Team
